documentation.text:
@title  TransparentFund
 @notice Locks donor ETH per campaign and releases it to NGO wallets
         only when the owner (platform) approves a milestone.
 CHANGES vs original (minimal — same behaviour):
   1. transfer() replaced with call() — avoids 2300-gas revert on contract wallets
   2. Explicit address(this).balance guard before transfer
   3. receive() added so contract can accept plain ETH sends
   4. releaseMilestone emits amount in wei (unchanged) — added natspec comments

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Donation must be greater than zero"

arguments.value: Donation must be greater than zero

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Donation must be greater than zero"

typeDescriptions.typeString: mapping(string memory => struct TransparentFund.Campaign storage ref)

documentation.text:
@notice Lock ETH for a campaign. Call with msg.value > 0.
 @param  _campaignId  Firestore campaign document ID (string)

typeDescriptions.typeString: mapping(string memory => struct TransparentFund.Campaign storage ref)

Free to call (no gas)."},"releaseMilestone(string,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Release locked ETH to an NGO wallet after milestone approval.         Only the platform owner can call this."}},"notice":"Locks donor ETH per campaign and releases it to NGO wallets         only when the owner (platform) approves a milestone. CHANGES vs original (minimal \u2014 same behaviour):   1. transfer() replaced with call() \u2014 avoids 2300-gas revert on contract wallets   2. Explicit address(this).balance guard before transfer   3. receive() added so contract can accept plain ETH sends   4. releaseMilestone emits amount in wei (unchanged) \u2014 added natspec comments","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/TransparentFund.sol":"TransparentFund"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/TransparentFund.sol":{"keccak256":"0x894042f49c475c57cd7a59e14ff0ffd977e39ecbae964207db2ca3a647f2cd72","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9d0016b468919543b8cc1e9b2584a6e6fe5d2f4bf4f46add6b123b94b0ecd4c3","dweb:/ipfs/QmeWSF4RaWQKX93LETtG5pmqkFhtDHKiAzcrtsass3eTWy"]}},"version":1}
